channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Avis à tous les télétravailleurs : cet écran 120 Hz de 27 pouces perd 15 euros chez Amazon
item.description: Avec son EK271Gbif, Acer propose un écran de 27 pouces à prix réduit puisqu'il perd 15 % de son prix chez Amazon. Un moniteur intéressant grâce à son taux de rafraîchissement de 120 Hz et son temps de réponse d'1 ms.

item.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
item.description: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

item.title: Meilleures liseuses électroniques : quel modèle choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Quelle est la meilleure liseuse, noir et blanc ou couleur, à acheter ? Entre les Kindle d'Amazon et les Kobo, mais aussi d'autres marques telles que Boox, voici nos recommandations des meilleures liseuses.

item.title: I upgraded to the MacBook Air M5 at last — and, boy, is it fast
item.description: I upgraded to the MacBook Air M5 and its lightning-fast performance puts my Intel-based MacBook Pro to shame.

item.title: New AI tool seeks to un-AI your writing
item.description: Sinceerly is a Google Chrome extension that aims to make AI-generated text more human.

item.title: With WonderCMS, I was able to get my business online in just a few steps
item.description: Installing a CMS on your web-based server doesn't have to be difficult. That's where WonderCMS comes in.

item.title: The climate tech IPO window could finally be cracking open
item.description: Nuclear startup X-energy went public, geothermal startup Fervo is about to. Could this be the moment that climate tech investors have been waiting for?

item.title: Want to stand out at work? Stop trying to be a star
item.description: The highest-performing teams aren’t built on individual brilliance. They’re built on trust, and collaboration. Our culture of individualism pushes each person to try to be a star. “Team player” has even come to have the negative implication of subverting one’s own well-being and best advantage, and maybe even becoming invisible to leadership.

item.title: J’ai testé la fonctionnalité « visages familiers » de Ring
item.description: La nouvelle fonctionnalité Visages familiers de Ring ajoute une touche d'intelligence à vos caméras, en leur permettant de reconnaître une personne et de vous notifier sa présence. J'ai pu la tester pendant quelques jours, voici mon verdict.

item.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
item.description: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Lidl’s owner, Schwarz Group. With the blessing of their governments, the companies intend to offer a sovereign alternative to enterprises in an AI landscape dominated by American players.

item.title: NASA's initial takeaways from the Artemis II mission, and more science stories
item.description: Now that Artemis II is all wrapped up, NASA has begun its post-game performance analyses of all the systems that worked together to get four astronauts safely to the moon and back earlier this month. In addition to taking humans farther than ever before, Artemis II served as a crucial test flight for upcoming crewed missions that are planned for as soon as 2027 and 2028, the latter being NASA's ambitious target for landing astronauts on the lunar surface. So far, the Orion spacecraft and the SLS rocket seem to have fared pretty well. NASA says its initial assessments of the crew capsule show ...
